query:
SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, oi.productName, COUNT(vm.id) as material_count
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.orderId
JOIN product_variants pv ON oi.variantId = pv.id
JOIN variant_materials vm ON pv.id = vm.variantId
WHERE o.deletedAt IS NULL
GROUP BY o.id, oi.id
HAVING material_count >= 4
LIMIT 5;

JOIN product_variants pv ON oi.variantId = pv.id
JOIN variant_materials vm ON pv.id = vm.variantId
